project_description: Sentiment analysis for customer opinions from all channels. Data integration from: call center (ASR transcripts), email, chat, social media, NPS surveys. Fine-tuning BERT-large model, management dashboard (real-time NPS, topics, trends), alerts on sudden sentiment drop for product/region.
client_history: Client analyzes NPS manually once per quarter — needs real-time.
risk_patterns: Call center transcripts have low quality (noise, accents) — ASR preprocessing difficult.
pm_comment: ASR transcript quality required an additional correction module — unplanned scope.
